message:
Fix bugs in update-cli and suggest commands

- update-cli.ts: Use || instead of ?? for empty checksum file check
  Empty string is not nullish, so ?? would return "" instead of null

- suggest.ts: Normalize relevance to 0-1 scale in JSON output
  BM25 scores (~0-5) now divided by 5 to match semantic scores (0-1)
  Ensures consistent JSON output regardless of search mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
